@graph.headline: AI Agents: The 24/7 Workforce Small Businesses Can't Afford to Ignore
@graph.description: Discover why 63% of companies lose leads due to slow response times and how autonomous AI agents deliver 21x higher conversion rates for small businesses.

mainEntity.name: How fast should I respond to leads?

acceptedAnswer.text: Research shows leads contacted within 5 minutes are 21 times more likely to convert. The fastest responders capture 78% of buyers. AI agents can respond in under 30 seconds, 24/7.

mainEntity.name: Can AI really work 24/7 for my business?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Modern AI agents operate continuously without breaks, holidays, or sick days. They handle lead qualification, appointment scheduling, and initial customer engagement around the clock at a fraction of the cost of human staff.

Speed to lead refers to how quickly a business responds to a new lead or inquiry. Faster response times dramatically increase conversion rates — businesses responding within 5 minutes are 21x more likely to close the deal.

mainEntity.name: How much does AI automation cost for a small business?

acceptedAnswer.text: AI automation typically costs a fraction of hiring additional staff. Companies using AI automation report an average ROI of 171%. A single AI agent can replace 3-4 full-time employees for lead response and qualification tasks.
